summary: From Cuba to the Persian Gulf, Trump is expected to face fresh challenges across a new arc of tanker diplomacy.

title: Mugabe's son pleads guilty to pointing a gun in South Africa
summary: Bellarmine Mugabe was arrested in February following the shooting of a 23-year-old man at his home in Johannesburg.
